---
title: "Space Biology"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

<div class="space-bg">

<img src="images/space.gif">

</div>

<div class="space-content">

# Space Biology

Although my current research focuses on sustainable agriculture on Earth, I am fascinated by how **microbe–mineral interactions** could help support future human exploration of space.

---

> *For me, space biology represents the intersection of nearly everything that has shaped my scientific journey—from microbial ecology and molecular biology to sustainable agriculture and environmental sequencing. It is a field where ecology, bioinformatics and human exploration converge, and one that I hope to contribute to in the future.*

<br>

<div style="text-align:right; font-size:0.8rem; opacity:0.8;">

Background animation © European Space Agency (ESA)

</div>

</div>
